answer:
The closing price on February 22, 2007, was $40.38 per share, and there were 419,988,395 outstanding shares.  
Market capitalization is calculated as price per share multiplied by the number of outstanding shares.  
Thus, the market capitalization is \( 40.38 \times 419,988,395 = 16,959,131,390.1 \).  

\boxed{16959131390.1}
